title: gleichenia umbraculifera
intro: Gleichenia umbraculifera, also known as the umbrella fern, is a species of fern in the family Gleicheniaceae. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial activities. The health benefits of Gleichenia umbraculifera include treating wounds, reducing fever, and alleviating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used in teas, infusions, and topical applications, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
